extortion.description: Elgon Cosmetic - was founded in 1970 in Italy. Since then, it has established itself as a leading manufacturer of professional hair care products, offering innovative and high-quality solutions for salons worldwide. Today, the brand continues to grow, constantly improving its products and staying aligned with the latest trends in the beauty industry.-- Company financial reports- Medical records- Personal user data- Product formulas- Customer data https://elgoncosmetic.com
